UML:TaggedValue.value: Informative ISO/CD TR 19121 UML package corrected for ISO/TC 211 Harmonised Model review. The package is treated as a conceptual UML model unless the project team decides to develop it into a formal normative implementation model. Corrections applied: consistent class naming, ISO 19103 CharacterString datatype for camera colour attributes, definitions for model elements, removal of placeholder Class1, and inclusion of referenced SD/SE classes in the main diagram.
Category of data acquired from sonar systems and related acoustic measurement or gridded representations.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of standards defining product specifications and requirements for derived imagery and gridded data products.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to ISO 19101-2 concepts relevant to geographic imagery and gridded data reference modelling.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of three-dimensional SAR-related processing, calibration, validation, or product concepts.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of storage-related standards, formats, encodings, and packaging approaches for imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of sonar sensor standards and related acoustic imagery or gridded data concepts.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of optical imagery data acquired by optical camera or imaging sensors.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of data cube concepts used to organise and analyse multi-dimensional imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of lidar sensor standards and related point cloud or derived gridded product concepts.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of imagery or gridded data acquired or derived from synthetic aperture radar sensors.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to calibration and validation concepts for microwave radiometer sensors and related imagery or gridded data products.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of data format standards defining file or container structures for imagery and gridded data exchange and storage.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to calibration and validation concepts for synthetic aperture radar sensors and products.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to calibration and validation concepts for remote sensing imagery sensors.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of classification tasks, methods, or outputs applied to imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to JSON-based metadata encoding concepts related to ISO 19115 metadata for imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.

Referenced data modelling method codelist or classification element retained for traceability. It should be reviewed by the project team to confirm whether it belongs in ISO 19121 or should be maintained as an external referenced element.
Codelist value representing an absolute value data modelling method.
Codelist value representing a basic sequential modelling method.
Codelist value representing a collection plane modelling method.
Codelist value representing a rectified image modelling method.
Reserved codelist value retained for compatibility or future specification.
Codelist value representing a vector modelling method.
Codelist value indicating that the data modelling method is not applicable.
Category of data represented as collections of spatially referenced points, including native point clouds and products derived from point cloud processing.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of metadata standards for discovery, identification, lineage, quality, acquisition, distribution, and use of imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of data acquired through scanning technologies and associated data modelling approaches.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of analytical or intelligence-oriented uses of imagery and gridded data, including AI-enabled interpretation.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to ISO 19115-2 metadata elements relevant to imagery acquisition, sensor information, and related metadata extensions.
Category of framework and reference model standards that provide conceptual foundations and architectural principles for geographic imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to analysis ready data concepts supporting immediate analytical use of imagery and gridded datasets.
Category of geometrically corrected image products in which scale and positional displacement have been adjusted for mapping use.
Reference to fundamental concepts for imagery and gridded data product specifications.
Reference to product specification concepts for optical imagery products.
Category of encoding standards defining machine-readable representation of imagery, gridded data, and associated metadata.
Category of processing tasks and operational activities relevant to imagery and gridded data workflows.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of emerging standards, technologies, and activities relevant to future interoperability of imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of standards that define structures, models, and representations for imagery, raster, point cloud, elevation, scanning, sonar, and related gridded datasets.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Reference to product specification concepts for SAR-derived imagery and gridded data products.
Category of standards describing processing, transformation, calibration, validation, classification, orientation, and analytical workflows for imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of elevation data products, including gridded elevation surfaces derived from sensors or processing workflows.

Referenced sensor model element retained for traceability. It should be reviewed by the project team to confirm whether it belongs in ISO 19121 or should be maintained as an external referenced model element.
Optional data modelling method associated with the sensor model.
Optional name or identifier of the sensor manufacturer.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of three-dimensional data models or products derived from imagery, lidar, scanning, or related geospatial acquisition methods.
Category of standards describing sensors, sensor metadata, calibration, validation, acquisition conditions, and observation processes for imagery and gridded data.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of SAR calibration or validation concepts involving corner reflectors.

Conceptual entry point for the ISO 19121 informative model identifying standards, profiles, data categories, services, encodings, processing activities, and emerging interoperability topics relevant to geographic imagery and gridded data.
Category of digital twin concepts using imagery, gridded data, and geospatial information for dynamic representation of physical systems.
Category of camera-based imaging sensors and related standards for optical image acquisition.
Generalization relationship indicating that the source class is a specialized concept under the target class for the informative ISO 19121 conceptual model.
Category of constrained implementations, subsets, or extensions of base standards for specific domains, communities, products, or operational environments.
Reference to ISO 19129 concepts relevant to imagery, gridded data, and geographic information framework alignment.

Referenced sensor description model element retained for traceability. It should be reviewed by the project team to confirm whether it belongs in ISO 19121 or should be maintained as an external referenced model element.
Identifier of the image or imagery resource to which the sensor model applies.
Category of service standards and interfaces for discovery, access, portrayal, processing, and delivery of imagery and gridded data.
Category of orientation and georeferencing concepts relevant to positioning imagery and gridded data.
Category of synthetic aperture radar sensor standards and related imagery concepts.
Reference to calibration and validation concepts for lidar sensors and lidar-derived data products.
Conceptual class describing colour-related characteristics or processing properties of camera imagery.
Description or identifier of the pan-sharpening approach, method, or processing status associated with camera colour imagery.
Description or identifier of the Bayer filter pattern used by a camera sensor to capture colour information.
false#NOTES#Values: true,false Default: false Description: If 'false', the class will be mapped to an XSDsimpleType. Else, it will be exported as an external dictionary.
#NOTES#Description: Default value for the URI representing the dictionary

UML:Diagram.name: ISO 19121 Imagery and gridded data - corrected conceptual UML overview

UML:TaggedValue.value: Corrected conceptual UML overview for ISO/CD TR 19121. Clause references have been removed from class names and should be documented in notes or figure captions rather than embedded in UML element names.
